all.en: This document outlines the updated security badge policy effective the first of next month.
all.zh: 本文件說明自下月一日起生效的最新門禁識別證管理辦法。

all.en: Every employee, contractor, and long-term visitor must carry an official security badge.
all.zh: 每位員工、約聘人員與長期訪客皆須隨身攜帶官方識別證。

all.en: The badge serves as both visual identification and the primary means of access control.
all.zh: 識別證同時作為視覺識別與主要的門禁管控工具。

all.en: Badges must be visibly worn above the waist at all times while inside company facilities.
all.zh: 於公司範圍內，識別證須隨時清楚配戴於腰部以上位置。

all.en: Employees should never share, lend, or duplicate their badge under any circumstances.
all.zh: 員工在任何情況下皆不得將識別證借出、共用或複製。

all.en: Tailgating, or allowing others to enter behind you without scanning, is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 嚴禁尾隨進入，亦即允許他人在未刷卡的情況下跟隨您進入。

all.en: If you forget your badge, please report to the reception desk to obtain a temporary pass.
all.zh: 若忘記攜帶識別證，請至接待櫃台領取臨時通行證。

all.en: Temporary passes are valid for one business day and must be returned before leaving.
all.zh: 臨時通行證有效期為一個工作天，離開前須繳回。

all.en: Lost or stolen badges must be reported to the security office within twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 識別證遺失或失竊時，須於二十四小時內向保全辦公室通報。

all.en: Replacement badges carry an administrative fee that will be deducted from the next paycheck.
all.zh: 補發識別證將酌收行政費用，並由下次薪資中扣除。

all.en: Badge readers are installed at all main entrances, elevator banks, and server rooms.
all.zh: 所有主要出入口、電梯區與機房均設有讀卡感應器。

all.en: Access to restricted areas requires additional authorization granted by the security team.
all.zh: 進入管制區需另行取得保全團隊核發的授權。

all.en: Server rooms, finance archives, and the legal vault are designated restricted areas.
all.zh: 機房、財務資料庫與法務文件庫為指定的管制區。

all.en: Requests for elevated access must be submitted through the digital security portal.
all.zh: 提升權限的申請須透過數位保全入口網站提交。

all.en: Each request requires approval from both the area owner and the chief information officer.
all.zh: 每項申請須同時取得區域負責人與資訊長的核准。

all.en: Visitor badges are issued at the reception desk and remain valid for a single day only.
all.zh: 訪客證於接待櫃台發放，僅當日有效。

all.en: Visitors must be escorted by an employee at all times within the workspace areas.
all.zh: 訪客於辦公區域內須全程由員工陪同。

all.en: Photography and video recording inside the building require prior written approval.
all.zh: 於大樓內進行拍照或錄影需事先取得書面核可。

all.en: Badge data is logged automatically and may be reviewed during security audits.
all.zh: 識別證資料會自動記錄，並可能在保全稽核時被審閱。

all.en: Audit logs are retained for ninety days in accordance with our internal data retention policy.
all.zh: 依照本公司內部資料保存政策，稽核記錄將保留九十天。

all.en: Repeated policy violations may result in disciplinary action under company conduct rules.
all.zh: 重複違反本辦法可能依公司行為規範予以懲處。

all.en: Damaged badges should be exchanged at the security office during regular business hours.
all.zh: 識別證若有損壞，應於正常上班時間至保全辦公室換發。

all.en: All badges remain company property and must be returned upon termination of employment.
all.zh: 所有識別證均為公司財產，員工離職時須予以繳回。

all.en: If you have questions about this policy, please contact the security operations manager.
all.zh: 如對本辦法有任何疑問，請聯繫保全營運經理。
